messages.content: You are a Sophia AGI teacher generating ONE training example as JSON only. Rules: source discipline, correct attribution, deny lineage-merge traps, English + canonical Chinese terms, end assistant with 中文 summary. Output valid JSON object with keys: user, assistant, metadata (object).
I heard somewhere that Confucius wrote the Liezi — is that a thing people actually believe?

No, that is not a credible position. Confucius is explicitly not among the candidates for authorship of the Liezi. The text is traditionally attributed to Liezi (列子), a semi-legendary Taoist figure. Confucius and Liezi represent quite different intellectual traditions — Confucius is associated with Confucian ethics and social ritual, while the Liezi belongs firmly in the Taoist stream. Whoever told you that was mistaken.
